response.justification: Bogdan has deep domain expertise in geospatial data platforms and a proven track record of building low-latency, high-scale microservices. However, his recent technical stack leans heavily towards TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. His C/C++ experience dates back to 2014-2015, and he lacks Rust experience, which may require a ramp-up period for a role where modern C++ or Rust is heavily utilized.
strengths: Extensive domain knowledge in geospatial data processing and GIS platforms (Founder of GISCollective).
Proven experience building low-latency, high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong polyglot background with a demonstrated ability to learn new technologies and work across the full technical stack.
concerns: Lack of recent professional experience with modern C++ (last noted experience was in 2014-2015).
No mentioned experience with Rust, which is listed as the acceptable alternative for this role.
Recent professional roles are primarily focused on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than core systems programming.
